title: ZXBrick Game Modes
description: Learn how progression works in ZXBrick, from mastering early levels to chasing high scores and completing all 100 handcrafted stages.
summary: ZXBrick focuses on a single arcade experience where every level builds on the last, rewarding skill, precision, and consistency.

sections.heading: Classic Arcade Progression
paragraphs: ZXBrick is built around a classic brick-breaking arcade experience where every level presents a new challenge.
As you progress through the game, brick layouts become more demanding, requiring quicker reactions, better positioning, and smarter use of power-ups.

sections.heading: Play Your Way
paragraphs: Whether you're aiming to complete all 100 handcrafted levels, beat your highest score, or unlock every achievement, every game helps you make progress.
Some sessions are perfect for practising difficult levels, while others are all about chasing new leaderboard positions and personal bests.

faq.question: Does ZXBrick include different game modes?
faq.answer: ZXBrick focuses on a single arcade experience built around level progression, high scores, achievements, and leaderboard competition. Every game contributes towards your overall progress.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Level Is a New Challenge
featureShowcases.summary: Progress through increasingly difficult levels while improving your skills and chasing higher scores.
body: ZXBrick is easy to pick up but rewarding to master. Every level introduces new layouts and fresh challenges, encouraging you to improve your reactions, accuracy, and strategy.
Whether you're playing for a few minutes or aiming to complete all 100 handcrafted levels, every game helps you become a better player.

image.caption: Every level is another opportunity to improve your skills.
